query: SELECT i.status as instanceStatus, COUNT(t.id) as pendingTaskCount FROM approvalTasks t INNER JOIN approvalInstances i ON t.instanceId = i.id WHERE t.status = 'pending' GROUP BY i.status;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT i.status as instanceStatus, COUNT(t.id) as pendingTaskCount FROM approvalTasks t INNER JOIN approvalInstances i ON t.instanceId = i.id WHERE t.status = 'pending' GROUP BY i.status;
